subject: ARP 1.1 Particle Extraction Issue
body:
Hello,



I’m having issues with particle extraction in WARP 1.1. BoxNet seems to
pick the particle locations correctly:

But when imported into cryospcarc there are issues:

Import job

2D class rd 2

2D class rd 3

2D class then takes about 10 iterations to get back to rd 2



2D class rd 20 (artifact is the most prominent class)







I’ve tested with the same dataset on WARP 0.9 and this artifact does not
show up:



Dimitry, do you see this issue with your workstation?



Thank you,

Matt
